results.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 final to feature Super Bowl-style halftime show, break likely to exceed 15 minutes
results.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 final will feature a star-studded closing ceremony and a Super Bowl-style halftime show, with global music icons set to perform. Reports suggest the halftime interval could be extended beyond the traditional 15 minutes, making it one of the biggest entertainment spectacles in World Cup history.

results.title: Who are the BBC pundits and commentators for England vs Argentina?
results.description: ENGLAND face Argentina tonight in a blockbuster World Cup semi-final. Spain beat France 2-0 last night to book their spot in Sunday night's final. As the Three Lions look to bring football home, the BBC have decided to fly their team out to Atlanta for the game rather than remaining at their Salford base. Build-up...

results.title: From Hand of God to Penalties of 98: Revisiting the intense England vs Argentina FIFA World Cup rivalry
